event.name: Glyph of Hashut
event.flavor: A brass rune flares beneath the dust and the chamber suddenly feels like a furnace.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score has triggered a concealed rune of Hashut. He suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. In addition, the blast leaves him reeling and he is at -1 Attack until the end of the next Monsters' Phase.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Ratling Snare
event.flavor: Thin wires whip out of the darkness and cinch tight around an ankle.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score has stepped into a Skaven snare. He suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for armour, and may do nothing until the start of the next Warriors' Phase unless an adjacent Warrior spends 1 Attack cutting him free.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Orc Drop Net
event.flavor: A rotten rope snaps overhead and a spiked net crashes down from the roof.
event.rules: Randomly determine which Warrior is caught in the net. He suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for armour, and is pinned. At the start of each Warriors' Phase he may cut himself free by sacrificing all his Attacks that turn, or an adjacent Warrior may free him by sacrificing 1 Attack.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Falling Idol
event.flavor: An ancient stone idol tilts forward as centuries of dust and rot finally give way.
event.rules: Each Warrior on this board section must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he is struck by flying masonry and suffers 1D6 + 1 Wounds. Normal modifiers for Toughness apply, but armour offers no protection against the crushing weight of the stone.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Grudge Axes
event.flavor: The scrape of hidden gears is followed by the whistle of old Dwarf-forged blades.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is targeted by a battery of spring-loaded axes. He suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifier for armour except a shield or helmet. If more than one Warrior rolls the same lowest score, all of them are hit.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Bad Moon Spores
event.flavor: Pale fungus bursts underfoot, filling the room with madly glittering spores.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he coughs and staggers, suffering 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4 he is merely dazed and is at -1 to hit until the end of the next Warriors' Phase. On a score of 5 or 6 he fights off the fumes.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Wardstone Spark
event.flavor: Blue-white light crawls across the walls as a cracked wardstone discharges its last strength.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1 Wound, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. If there is a Wizard in the party, the magical backlash also causes him to suffer -1 on all casting rolls until the start of the next Power Phase.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Poison Censer
event.flavor: A rusted censer swings from a hidden chain and bursts open in a cloud of yellow gas.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4 he suffers no damage but is weakened and is at -1 Strength until the end of the next combat. On a score of 5 or 6 he avoids the fumes.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Blood Runes
event.flavor: Dark symbols ooze fresh blood as soon as the Warriors step across them.
event.rules: Randomly determine which Warrior the runes demand tribute from. He suffers 1D6 + 1 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. The rune-fire then gutters out, leaving the stones slick and smoking.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Knife Slot
event.flavor: Rows of hidden slits open in the wall with a dry metallic click.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is struck by a storm of knives and suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for armour. If more than one Warrior rolls the same lowest score, each of them suffers the damage.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: False Floor
event.flavor: The flagstones split apart beneath a Warrior's boots, revealing a black drop below.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score falls into a concealed pit and suffers 2D6 Wounds. He may escape in one turn if the party has a rope or access to Levitate. Otherwise he must spend his next turn climbing out and may do nothing else.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Screaming Skulls
event.flavor: A ring of skulls set into the walls begins shrieking with the voices of the dead.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4 he escapes physical harm but is shaken, suffering -1 to hit in the next combat. On a score of 5 or 6 he hardens his heart and ignores the terror.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Cold Fire
event.flavor: Pale witchfire races across the floor in a ring around the Warriors.
event.rules: Each Warrior on this board section must roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 he is scorched by unnatural flames and suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 he leaps clear before the blue fire can bite.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Blackpowder Cache
event.flavor: A stray spark ignites a forgotten cache of powder left behind by some ill-fated engineer.
event.rules: There is a deafening blast. Every model on this board section suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. Loose stones, smoke and ringing ears fill the chamber for a few moments before the dust settles.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Midden Leeches
event.flavor: A slick patch of filth erupts into a mass of hungry black leeches.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is covered by the creatures and suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for armour. Until the end of the next Warriors' Phase he is at -1 Move as he tears them from his flesh. A healing potion removes this penalty immediately.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Shrine of Morr
event.flavor: A black altar bearing the raven sigil of Morr stands untouched in the gloom.
event.rules: If the Warriors spend one full turn in silence before the shrine, the god of the dead grants them uneasy peace. No Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase, and one Warrior of the party's choice recovers 2D6 Wounds. If the Warriors disturb the shrine instead, nothing happens save the sour smell of old incense. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Dwarfen Waystones
event.flavor: Rune-carved stones set into the floor still show the measured craft of a vanished hold.
event.rules: If the Warriors take time to read the waystones, they may look at the next three Dungeon cards and reorder them as they wish. A Dwarf automatically understands the markings. If there is no Dwarf in the party, any other Warrior must roll 1D6 and score 4, 5 or 6 to interpret the runes correctly. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Skaven Scratchings
event.flavor: Filthy claw-marks and greasy symbols cover the walls where ratmen once argued over stolen routes.
event.rules: The Warriors may use the markings to avoid danger. If they do, discard the next Dungeon card drawn and replace it with the one after it. However, each Warrior must also lose 1D6 x 10 gold as unseen Skaven fingers pluck coins and trinkets from their packs while they study the wall. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Bretonnian Vow
event.flavor: A faded grail-shield hangs above a cracked stone bench, as if waiting for one more oath to be sworn.
event.rules: One Warrior may kneel and swear to face the darkness without flinching. In the first round of the next combat that Warrior gains +2 Attacks. If he is reduced to 0 Wounds in that combat, the blessing is considered spent whether he survives or not. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Pilgrim Bones
event.flavor: The remains of a long-dead pilgrim rest beneath a cloak covered in holy badges from across the Empire.
event.rules: If the Warriors spend a turn laying the pilgrim to rest, each Warrior may take 1D6 x 10 gold in votive coins from the burial niche and no Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase. If the Warriors simply loot the body and move on, each Warrior gains the gold but there is an Unexpected Event on a roll of 1 or 2 in the next Power Phase instead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Smugglers Cache
event.flavor: A loose block reveals a dry niche crammed with contraband, lamp oil and travel gear.
event.rules: The Warriors may choose one of the following benefits: either recover 1 Wound each as they share the provisions, or take goods worth 2D6 x 25 gold to divide amongst the party, or keep the rope and tools found here so that the next Pit-style trap encountered this adventure has no effect. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Lost Lamplighter
event.flavor: An old man in a soot-black coat emerges from the dark, carrying a lamp that burns with a steady yellow flame.
event.rules: The stranger silently guides the Warriors through a side passage before vanishing. The Warriors may look at the next two Dungeon cards and reorder them as they wish. In addition, if either card is an Event, they may discard it and draw the following Dungeon card instead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Echo of Nagash
event.flavor: A whisper not meant for mortal ears slips through the chamber and claws at the mind.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6 and add his Toughness, not including armour. If the total is 7 or more he resists the whisper and gains +1 to hit in the first round of the next combat against Undead. If the total is less than 7 he suffers 1 Wound, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour, but still learns enough to gain the bonus. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Squig Mushroom Bed
event.flavor: Fat cave mushrooms grow in a churned patch of earth littered with gnawed bones and squig droppings.
event.rules: Any Warrior may eat one of the mushrooms. For each Warrior who does so, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 he suffers 1D6 Wounds. On a score of 2, 3 or 4 there is no effect. On a score of 5 he recovers 1D6 Wounds. On a score of 6 he recovers 1D6 Wounds and gains +1 Attack in the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: River of Filth
event.flavor: A sluggish river of black sewage blocks the way, carrying bones, broken shields and worse things besides.
event.rules: The Warriors may cross carefully, which takes one extra turn, or they may rummage through the foul debris as they wade. If they search, one randomly determined Warrior finds 2D6 x 25 gold, but until the party is fully across the channel there is an Unexpected Event in each Power Phase on a roll of 1 or 2 instead of only on a 1. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Sealed Ossuary
event.flavor: A mortared stone door marked with old funerary symbols has somehow remained untouched.
event.rules: The Warriors may break the seal and investigate. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2, choking dust pours out and each Warrior on this board section suffers 1 Wound, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4, the ossuary contains funerary masks and rings worth 2D6 x 20 gold. On a score of 5 or 6, the Warriors recover blessed salts and gain +1 to hit in the first round of the next combat against Undead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Mercenary Map
event.flavor: A dead sellsword still clutches a bloodstained map annotated with hurried curses and warnings.
event.rules: The map shows enough of the dungeon to be useful before it falls apart in your hands. The Warriors may look at the next three Dungeon cards and reorder them as they wish. If one of those cards is an objective room, it must remain amongst the three cards but may be moved within them. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ancestor Mask
event.flavor: A bronze death-mask of a Dwarf lord hangs from an iron peg, waiting for a worthy bearer.
event.rules: One Warrior may wear the mask into the next combat. Until that combat ends he gains +1 Toughness and cannot be pinned by Undead. At the end of the combat roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the ancient spirit departs in anger and the Warrior suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Sigmarite Reliquary
event.flavor: A cracked reliquary of beaten silver bears the twin-tailed comet beneath a crust of old wax.
event.rules: If the Warriors kneel and recite a prayer to Sigmar, one Warrior of the party's choice recovers 2D6 Wounds. In addition, in the first round of the next combat against Chaos or Undead, every Warrior gains +1 Attack. If the Warriors break open the reliquary for valuables, it contains nothing but dust. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ghoul Feast
event.flavor: A long stone table is strewn with gnawed corpses, crude candles and silver goblets blackened by grime.
event.rules: Any Warrior who searches the table must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he catches corpse-fever and is at -1 Move for the rest of the adventure. On a score of 3 or 4 he finds coins and rings worth 1D6 x 20 gold. On a score of 5 or 6 he finds healing herbs amongst the rot and recovers 1D6 Wounds. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Runes of Warning
event.flavor: Freshly painted warning runes in Khazalid point towards cracks and murder-holes in the walls.
event.rules: The Warriors are forewarned and ready. The next time Monsters are revealed, they do not attack immediately, even if another rule would allow them to do so. In addition, each Warrior gains +1 Attack in the first round of that combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Thief in the Dark
event.flavor: Soft feet patter just beyond the lantern light and a small shadow darts between broken pillars.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. The Warrior with the lowest score loses 1D6 x 20 gold to an unseen thief. If another Warrior chooses to give up his next turn chasing the culprit, the stolen gold is recovered and the thief drops a healing draught that restores 1D6 Wounds to one Warrior. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Fungus Brew
event.flavor: A bubbling iron pot still hangs over a cold fire where Goblin shamans once brewed their vile concoctions.
event.rules: One Warrior may drink the brew. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4 he recovers 1D6 Wounds. On a score of 5 or 6 he recovers 1D6 Wounds and gains +1 Attack in the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Forgotten Gaol
event.flavor: Rusting cages line the walls and a handful of starved captives beg the Warriors for freedom.
event.rules: Freeing the prisoners takes 1D6 turns. For each turn spent forcing locks and chains, there is an Unexpected Event in the Power Phase on a roll of 1 or 2 instead of only on a 1. If the Warriors survive the dungeon and escort the prisoners to the nearest Settlement, each Warrior gains 1D6 x 50 gold as reward. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Chaos Dwarf Ledger
event.flavor: Iron tablets etched in harsh runes record tribute, patrol routes and the names of slaves long dead.
event.rules: If the Warriors take time to decipher the tablets, they may make the next roll on a Monster Table as if the party were one Battle-level lower. A Dwarf or Wizard may read the ledger automatically. Any other Warrior must roll 1D6 and score 5 or 6 to make use of it. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Moonlit Well
event.flavor: Pale light gleams from a still pool that reflects a night sky far above, though no opening can be seen.
event.rules: Each Warrior may drink from the well once. Roll 1D6 for each Warrior who does so. On a score of 1 he is chilled to the bone and suffers -1 Strength in the next combat. On a score of 2, 3, 4 or 5 he recovers 1D6 Wounds. On a score of 6 he recovers 2D6 Wounds. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Plague Cart
event.flavor: A broken Skaven handcart lies on its side, packed with foul jars, mouldy wrappings and brass tubes.
event.rules: The Warriors may search the cart. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2, a jar bursts and each Warrior on this board section suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4, the cart holds usable bandages and herbs, enough for two separate restorations of 1D6 Wounds each. On a score of 5 or 6, the Warriors find 2D6 x 25 gold and pungent repellents, so the next time Skaven are rolled on a Monster Table you may reroll once. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Watchers in the Stone
event.flavor: Carved faces stare from every wall, their gem eyes turned towards the lantern flame.
event.rules: If the Warriors extinguish all light and wait in darkness for one full turn, a hidden panel opens. The party may inspect the next Dungeon card before drawing it, and each Warrior recovers 1 Wound as cool air flows from the secret passage. If the Warriors do not wait, the chamber remains silent and closed. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Last Stand
event.flavor: A barricade of shattered shields and splintered spear shafts marks where stout defenders met their end.
event.rules: If the Warriors search the barricade respectfully, each Warrior gains 1D6 x 10 gold in loose coin. In addition, one Warrior of the party's choice takes a battered but serviceable shield boss and gains +1 Toughness against the first hit that wounds him in the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Tunnel Tax
event.flavor: A crude booth of planks and bones blocks the way, daubed with Goblin glyphs demanding payment.
event.rules: Each Warrior may pay 50 gold to pass quietly. If every Warrior pays, no Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase. If the party refuses, roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 hidden bomb charges explode and each Warrior suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 the booth collapses to reveal a cache worth 2D6 x 25 gold. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Hermit Seer
event.flavor: A blind hermit sits cross-legged beside a heap of bones, murmuring prophecies to no-one at all.
event.rules: The seer offers the Warriors a single warning before fading into the shadows. The Warriors may look at the next two Dungeon cards and reorder them as they wish. In addition, during the next combat one Warrior may reroll a single missed attack. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Grave Sand
event.flavor: A funerary urn lies broken, spilling perfumed yellow sand across the flagstones.
event.rules: One Warrior may coat his weapon with the grave sand. The first successful hit he inflicts against an Undead model in the next combat causes +1 Damage. If no Undead are encountered before the end of the adventure, the sand may instead be sold in the next Settlement for 50 gold. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Echoing Horn
event.flavor: An ivory warhorn hangs from a peg, polished by hands that must have died centuries ago.
event.rules: The Warriors may sound the horn. If they do, no Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase, but the next Monsters they fight gain +1 Attack each in the first round as the blast echoes through the tunnels. If they leave the horn untouched, one Warrior may keep it and sell it for 100 gold at the next Settlement. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Vault of Oaths
event.flavor: A domed chamber of polished stone is covered from floor to roof with names and sworn grudges.
event.rules: If every Warrior spends one full turn in silence speaking his name and purpose, the ancient hall answers with a low rumble. In the first round of the next combat, all Warriors gain +1 Attack and are not subject to pinning. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Hunters Mark
event.flavor: Bloody handprints and snapped arrows show that a skilled hunter stalked some great beast through these halls.
event.rules: The Warriors study the spoor and learn where to strike. One Warrior of the party's choice gains +2 to hit against the toughest Monster in the next combat. If that Warrior personally slays that model, he gains an extra 100 gold for the deed. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ghostly Masons
event.flavor: Transparent Dwarf craftsmen emerge from the walls, tapping at stone with tools that ring like distant bells.
event.rules: If a Cave In or Portcullis currently blocks the Warriors' retreat, the ghostly masons clear it and then vanish. If there is no such obstacle in play, make a note that the next Cave In or Portcullis event drawn this adventure is ignored instead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Silent Bell
event.flavor: A cracked monastery bell hangs over the chamber, yet when it moves no sound comes forth.
event.rules: Touching the bell stills the dungeon for a while. No Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase. In addition, until the end of the next Warriors' Phase the Warriors may move normally and are not subject to pinning by wandering creatures or swarms. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Banner in the Dust
event.flavor: An Imperial battle-banner lies half buried in rubble, its faded colors still stubbornly bright beneath the grime.
event.rules: One Warrior may carry the banner into the next combat. Until that combat ends he gains +1 Toughness and cannot be pinned. If the Warriors win that combat while the banner is still borne, each Warrior gains 50 gold from the confidence and discipline it inspires in their search. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Lahmian Mirror
event.flavor: A black glass mirror framed in silver shows each Warrior a richer, stronger and more terrible version of himself.
event.rules: Any Warrior may choose to gaze into the mirror. For each Warrior who does so, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 he suffers 1 Wound and loses 1D6 x 10 gold to the hungry glamour. On a score of 2, 3 or 4 nothing happens. On a score of 5 he may help reorder the next two Dungeon cards. On a score of 6 he gains +1 to hit in the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Slayers Cairn
event.flavor: A low cairn of orange-crested helms and rune-marked stones stands at the crossing of two tunnels.
event.rules: One Warrior may swear a Slayer's oath before the cairn. In the next combat he gains +1 Strength and +1 Attack, but if he is able to move he must always move towards the nearest Monster. If he survives the combat, the party finds 150 gold in old offerings wedged between the stones. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Brimstone Vent
event.flavor: The crackle of hidden pressure is followed by a roaring jet of sulphurous flame.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score has triggered a vent in the floor and suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. In addition, the choking smoke leaves him at -1 to hit until the end of the next Warriors' Phase.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Gutter Runner Dart
event.flavor: A tiny hiss in the darkness is the only warning before a poisoned dart strikes home.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is hit by a concealed Skaven dart and suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifier for armour. Roll another 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 the poison numbs his limbs and he is at -1 Move until the end of the next combat.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Doomwheel Surge
event.flavor: Warp-lightning races through old brass conduits buried in the walls.
event.rules: Randomly determine which Warrior is struck by the main discharge. He suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. Then roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 the lightning arcs to the next nearest Warrior, inflicting 1D6 Wounds on him with no modifiers for Toughness or armour.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Frost Rime Trap
event.flavor: A glaze of white creeps over the stones as unnatural winter grips the chamber.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he slips on the frozen floor and suffers 1D6 Wounds. On a score of 3 or 4 he keeps his feet but is slowed by the rime and is at -1 Move until the end of the next Warriors' Phase. On a score of 5 or 6 he avoids the trap.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Chain Flail Pendulum
event.flavor: Heavy chains rattle overhead and a spiked flail swings out of a hidden slot.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is smashed aside by the pendulum and suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifier for armour except a helmet. He is also pinned until the end of the next Warriors' Phase.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Sunken Step
event.flavor: A treacherous stair gives way beneath a Warrior's weight with a crunch of broken stone.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score traps his leg in a collapsing step and suffers 1D6 Wounds. Until the end of the next Warriors' Phase he may not move unless an adjacent Warrior spends all his Attacks helping him free.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Runeflare Lens
event.flavor: An old crystal lens pivots in the ceiling and flashes with blinding light.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 he is dazzled and suffers -1 to hit in the next combat. The Warrior with the lowest score also suffers 1D6 Wounds as the focused beam burns into his flesh, with no modifier for armour.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Bat Swarm Cloud
event.flavor: A black cloud of cave bats explodes from the roof, filling the chamber with claws and wings.
event.rules: Randomly determine which Warrior is engulfed by the swarm. He suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. In addition, all Warriors on this board section are at -1 to hit until the end of the next Warriors' Phase as they fight through the chaos.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Cauldron Spill
event.flavor: A corroded chain snaps and an iron cauldron overturns in a flood of scalding slime.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is drenched by the boiling muck and suffers 2D6 Wounds. Toughness applies normally, but armour offers no protection. He is also at -1 Move until the end of the next Warriors' Phase.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Spiteful Echo
event.flavor: A mocking voice repeats the Warriors' own words back at them until the sound turns murderous.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1 Wound, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. If there is a Wizard in the party, the sorcerous resonance also inflicts -1 on all his casting rolls until the start of the next Power Phase.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Bone Shards
event.flavor: The ceiling cracks open and showers the room with splintered bones and jagged stone.
event.rules: Each Warrior on this board section must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1D6 Wounds from the razor-sharp fragments. Normal Toughness applies, but armour offers no protection against the hail of debris.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Iron Maiden Door
event.flavor: The next doorway slams shut like the jaws of some enormous trap.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Warrior. The Warrior with the lowest score is caught by spiked iron shutters and suffers 2D6 Wounds, with no modifier for armour. He may do nothing until the start of the next Warriors' Phase as the others wrench the trap apart.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Censer Mites
event.flavor: Clouds of tiny stinging vermin pour from a cracked plague censer at the Warriors' feet.
event.rules: Each Warrior must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 he suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4 he is not badly hurt but is left weakened and is at -1 Toughness until the end of the next combat. On a score of 5 or 6 he brushes the creatures aside.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Furnace Backdraft
event.flavor: A gust rushes through the tunnels and a line of embers bursts into a wall of fire.
event.rules: Each Warrior on this board section must roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 he suffers 1D6 + 1 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 he dives aside just in time.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Witch Sigil
event.flavor: A faded hex-mark on the threshold flares green as the Warriors pass over it.
event.rules: Randomly determine which Warrior draws the brunt of the curse. He suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour, and is at -1 to hit in the next combat as the sigil burns in his sight.
event.special: Roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 draw another Event card immediately.

event.name: Shallyan Font
event.flavor: A white marble basin still holds clear water untouched by the dungeon's filth.
event.rules: If the Warriors spend one full turn tending their hurts at the font, each Warrior recovers 1D3 Wounds. In addition, one Warrior of the party's choice may remove a temporary penalty to Move, Strength or to hit. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ranalds Cache
event.flavor: A loose stone hides a cunningly made thief-box marked with the sign of Ranald.
event.rules: One Warrior may try his luck with the cache. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 the compartment is trapped with a spring-latch and he loses 1D6 x 10 gold from his purse as the mechanism snaps shut. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 he uncovers 3D6 x 20 gold in stolen coin and a handful of marked tokens. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ostland Standard
event.flavor: A tattered black wolf banner leans against the wall, stubbornly refusing to rot away.
event.rules: One Warrior may bear the standard into the next combat. While he does so, all Warriors gain +1 Attack in the first round of that combat. If the standard-bearer is reduced to 0 Wounds, the effect ends immediately. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Kislevite Charm
event.flavor: A small ivory bear hangs from a thong of blue leather near a heap of frozen bones.
event.rules: One Warrior may take the charm. In the next combat, the first 2 Wounds he suffers are ignored as the spirit of Ursun hardens him against pain. Once used, the charm crumbles into frost. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Taal Shrine
event.flavor: Antlers and weathered oak leaves have been arranged into a shrine to the god of wild places.
event.rules: If the Warriors leave the shrine undisturbed and spend one turn listening to the dark, they gain a hunter's calm. Until the end of the next combat each Warrior is at +1 Move, and the next Monsters revealed do not attack immediately. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ulrics Embers
event.flavor: A dead brazier suddenly stirs with blue flames as cold as winter in Middenheim.
event.rules: One Warrior may thrust his hands into the embers and take Ulric's ferocity into himself. In the next combat he gains +1 Strength and is immune to Fear. If there are no enemies before the adventure ends, the blessing is simply lost. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Cartographers Mark
event.flavor: Neat chalk arrows and distances are written on the wall in the hand of a careful explorer.
event.rules: The markings are recent enough to trust. The Warriors may look at the next four Dungeon cards and reorder them as they wish. If one of those cards is an objective room, it must remain within those four cards. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Middenheim Relief
event.flavor: A stone relief shows Wolf Priests hurling back horrors from the gates of Middenheim.
event.rules: The sight steels the Warriors' hearts. In the first round of the next combat, every Warrior gains +1 to hit. If that combat is against Chaos or Beastmen, each Warrior also gains +1 Attack in the first round. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Estalian Duelist
event.flavor: The ghost of a lean swordsman bows with exquisite courtesy and points his blade at the nearest Warrior.
event.rules: One Warrior may accept the duel. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 he is outmatched and suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 he earns the spectre's respect and gains +2 to hit in the first round of the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Tilean Contract
event.flavor: A dead mercenary captain still grips a sealed contract and a purse heavy with advance pay.
event.rules: The Warriors may take up the contract. If they do, nominate one Warrior as paymaster. If the paymaster survives the adventure, each Warrior gains 1D6 x 50 gold in the next Settlement when the contract is honoured. If the paymaster is reduced to 0 Wounds at any point, the contract is lost. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Nehekharan Jar
event.flavor: A painted jar sealed with resin sits untouched in a funerary alcove.
event.rules: Breaking the seal reveals sacred oils from distant Nehekhara. One Warrior may anoint his wounds and recover 2D6 Wounds. In addition, the first successful hit he inflicts against Undead in the next combat causes +2 Damage. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Abbot Skeleton
event.flavor: A robed skeleton kneels before a stone lectern, its bony hands still clasped in prayer.
event.rules: If the Warriors lay the Abbot's remains to rest, no Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase. In addition, hidden in the lectern is a single healing draught that restores 2D6 Wounds to one Warrior. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Amber Wizard Tracks
event.flavor: Massive paw prints and staff marks cross the dust and vanish into a crack in the wall.
event.rules: The Warriors follow the signs of an Amber Wizard and learn something of the creatures ahead. The next time you roll on a Monster Table, you may reroll the result once or resolve it as if the party were one Battle-level lower. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Vampires Coffin
event.flavor: An ornate coffin of black wood stands in an alcove draped with moth-eaten velvet.
event.rules: The Warriors may pry it open. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2, a swarm of bats bursts out and each Warrior on this board section suffers 1 Wound, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. On a score of 3 or 4, the coffin holds rings and brooches worth 2D6 x 25 gold. On a score of 5 or 6, it contains a vial of dark elixir that restores 2D6 Wounds to one Warrior, but he is at -1 Toughness in the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Ironbreakers Oath
event.flavor: An oathstone covered in soot and axe-nicks still bears the names of a lost Ironbreaker guard.
event.rules: If the Warriors pause to touch the stone and swear to hold fast, the next Cave In or falling masonry effect encountered this adventure has no effect. In addition, during the next trap event each Warrior counts as having +1 Toughness against any Wounds suffered. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Waywatcher Sign
event.flavor: A tiny carved leaf marks a crack in the wall where only Elven eyes would normally look.
event.rules: The sign reveals a safer route. The Warriors may look at the next two Dungeon cards. If either card would reveal Monsters, they may discard that card and draw the following Dungeon card instead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Flagellant Graffiti
event.flavor: Bloody prayers and ragged warnings have been scrawled across the wall by a penitent madman.
event.rules: One Warrior may take the fanatic's lesson to heart and scourge himself for strength. He suffers 1D3 Wounds. If he does so, all Warriors gain +1 Attack in the first round of the next combat against Chaos or Undead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Deep Delver Tools
event.flavor: A bundle of pitons, hammers and pry-bars lies neatly stacked beside a collapsed shaft.
event.rules: The Warriors may keep the tools. The next time a Locked Door, Portcullis, Pit or Stone Block style event would hinder the party, the tools allow them to overcome it automatically with no delay. If unused by the end of the adventure, the tools may be sold for 75 gold. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: River Watch Rune
event.flavor: A weathered rune-post stands in a recess where an underground stream once flowed.
event.rules: The rune's old magic still holds a little power. No Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase. In addition, the next time a trap event is drawn, roll 1D6. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 that trap is ignored completely. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Beastmen Totem
event.flavor: A foul totem of horn and hide leers from the corner, surrounded by crude fetishes and old blood.
event.rules: The Warriors may smash the totem or leave it be. If they smash it, each Warrior gains 1D6 x 10 gold in teeth, charms and trinkets, but the next Beastmen the party fights attack immediately. If they leave it untouched, the next time the party fights Beastmen each Warrior gains +1 to hit in the first round instead. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Forgotten Chantry
event.flavor: A side chapel of cracked stone and dust-covered icons offers a rare sense of sanctuary.
event.rules: If the Warriors spend one full turn in prayer or quiet rest, each Warrior recovers 1 Wound. In addition, one Warrior of the party's choice may recover a further 1D6 Wounds as he draws strength from the chantry. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Hexensnacht Candles
event.flavor: Seven black candles burn with steady flames around a circle of old ash.
event.rules: If there is a Wizard in the party, he may carry the candles' power with him and gains +1 on all casting rolls until the start of the next Power Phase. If there is no Wizard, one Warrior may instead keep the candles and sell them for 100 gold at the next Settlement. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Dead Messenger
event.flavor: A courier in Imperial livery lies where he fell, his satchel still bound shut with wax.
event.rules: The Warriors may break the seals and read the dispatches, allowing them to look at the next three Dungeon cards and reorder them as they wish. Alternatively, they may keep the letters intact. If so, and they reach the next Settlement, each Warrior gains 1D6 x 25 gold from the grateful recipient. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Stolen Idol
event.flavor: A small golden idol sits on a pile of mouldering sacks where thieves clearly meant to return for it.
event.rules: The Warriors may return the idol to the nearby niche or steal it. If they return it, no Unexpected Event is rolled in the next Power Phase and one Warrior recovers 2D6 Wounds. If they keep it, the party gains 150 gold but there is an Unexpected Event in the next Power Phase on a roll of 1 or 2 instead of only on a 1. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Warded Arch
event.flavor: Silver nails and scraps of scripture have been hammered into a low archway ahead.
event.rules: The first Warrior to pass beneath the arch gains its protection. The next spell-like effect or trap effect that would inflict Wounds on him this adventure is ignored completely. In addition, the next Monsters revealed do not attack immediately. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Mad Prophet
event.flavor: A ragged visionary sways in the dark, muttering fragments of doom and victory in the same breath.
event.rules: Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 or 2 his ramblings waste precious time and there is an Unexpected Event in the next Power Phase on a roll of 1 or 2 instead of only on a 1. On a score of 3 or 4 his warning is useful and the Warriors may look at the next two Dungeon cards and reorder them. On a score of 5 or 6 he presses herbs and charms into the Warriors' hands, allowing one Warrior to recover 2D6 Wounds and granting a reroll on the next Monster Table result. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Buried Powder Horn
event.flavor: A powder horn and engineer's charges are wrapped in oilskin beneath a slab near the wall.
event.rules: The Warriors may save the charge for battle or for obstacles. If used in battle, one Warrior of the party's choice gains +2 Damage on the first successful hit he inflicts in the next combat. If used on the way ahead, the next blocked door or portcullis encountered is blown open automatically. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Emerald Moss
event.flavor: Bright green moss glows softly in a damp cleft in the stone, giving off a clean herbal scent.
event.rules: Any Warrior may harvest and apply the moss. For each Warrior who does so, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 there is no effect. On a score of 2, 3, 4 or 5 he recovers 1D3 Wounds. On a score of 6 he recovers 1D6 Wounds and may also remove one temporary penalty affecting him. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Iron Keyring
event.flavor: A ring of heavy old keys hangs from a peg hammered into a crack in the wall.
event.rules: The Warriors may keep the keys. The next Locked Door, Portcullis or prison-style obstacle encountered this adventure is opened automatically. If no such obstacle appears before the end of the adventure, the keys may be sold for 75 gold in the next Settlement. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Seer Stone
event.flavor: A polished black stone the size of a fist rests in a cradle of old bronze.
event.rules: The stone offers a brief glimpse ahead. Before the next Dungeon card is drawn, the Warriors may inspect it. After seeing it, they may place it back on top of the deck or move it to second place. In addition, one Warrior may reroll a single missed attack in the next combat. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Marienburg Lockbox
event.flavor: A lacquered merchant's coffer lies wedged behind a fallen beam, still locked tight.
event.rules: One Warrior may try to open the box. Roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the box cracks loudly but holds nothing. On a score of 2, 3 or 4 it contains 2D6 x 25 gold. On a score of 5 or 6 it contains 3D6 x 25 gold and a fine cordial that restores 1D6 Wounds to one Warrior. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Black Ark Trinket
event.flavor: A cruelly beautiful amulet of Dark Elf make glitters amongst a scatter of old bones.
event.rules: One Warrior may wear the trinket into the next combat. In the first round he gains +1 Attack and +1 to hit. However, if he rolls any natural 1 to hit during that combat, the amulet bites into his flesh and he suffers 1 Wound, with no modifiers for Toughness or armour. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Sylvan Whisper
event.flavor: A cool woodland breeze stirs the dust, carrying for a moment the scent of leaf and rain.
event.rules: The blessing of some distant wood settles briefly upon the Warriors. In the next combat each Warrior gains +1 Move and +1 Attack in the first round. In addition, the next pit or collapse effect encountered this adventure has no effect on the party. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Morrs Lantern
event.flavor: A pale lantern burns with a graveyard light that no draft can extinguish.
event.rules: One Warrior may carry the lantern until the end of the next combat. While he does so, Undead and Daemons may not pin any Warrior in the party. In addition, one Warrior of the party's choice immediately recovers 1D6 Wounds. No treasure is gained for completing this event.

event.name: Wolfshead Helm
event.flavor: A heavy wolf-headed helm rests on a broken pedestal, its eye-slits still bright with cold purpose.
event.rules: One Warrior may don the helm for the next combat. In the first round he gains +1 Toughness and +1 Attack. If he is able to move, he must always move towards the nearest Monster while wearing it. No treasure is gained for completing this event.
